name: @edgeone/pages-blob
description: Blob storage SDK for EdgeOne Pages functions

scripts.test: vitest run && cd __tests__/npm-install-test && npm install && npm run test:test && npm run test:prod
scripts.test:test: cd __tests__/npm-install-test && npm install && npm run test:test
scripts.test:prod: cd __tests__/npm-install-test && npm install && npm run test:prod
scripts.prepack: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run typecheck
